creator.workspace.title: Build structured learning content for learners.
creator.workspace.description: Create procedure drafts, shape clinical posts, and manage access states from one local creator workflow.
creator.workspace.launchpad.title: Authoring launchpad
creator.workspace.launchpad.description: Start with one content type, keep the draft narrow, and expand only after the structure is clear.
creator.workspace.launchpad.procedure: Capture title, summary, chapters, media, decision points, references, and access state for a structured procedure draft.
creator.workspace.launchpad.post: Draft a clinical writeup with body copy, photos, tags, optional assessment links, and access state.
creator.workspace.access.title: Access states
creator.workspace.access.description: Creator visibility now maps directly to the learner pricing and premium marketplace model.
creator.workspace.access.free: Published content visible on the free learner tier.
creator.workspace.access.paid: Included in the paid learner tier starting at $5/month.
creator.workspace.access.premium: Sold as premium creator content with a 30% Operio platform fee.
creator.workspace.recent.title: Recent creator activity
creator.workspace.recent.description: The newest locally saved creator item appears here first.
creator.workspace.recent.empty: No creator drafts have been saved yet.
creator.library.title: Manage drafts and published creator content.
creator.library.description: Review the current local creator items, reopen them for editing, and keep draft versus published state visible.
creator.library.empty.all.title: No creator items yet
creator.library.empty.all.description: Create a procedure or post draft to start building the creator library.
creator.library.empty.draft.title: No drafts yet
creator.library.empty.draft.description: Save a creator item as a draft to keep iterating before publish state.
creator.library.empty.published.title: No published items yet
creator.library.empty.published.descript: Publish a creator item locally to preview how the management flow separates released content.
creator.editor.description.new: Choose one content type and define the structured fields needed for a stable creator draft.
creator.editor.description.edit: Refine the stored creator item without leaving the current workflow.
creator.editor.missing.title: Creator item not found
creator.editor.missing.description: The requested creator item is not available in local storage anymore.
creator.editor.procedure.title: Procedure draft
creator.editor.procedure.description: Capture the core structure for a creator-authored procedure without overbuilding the editor.
creator.editor.procedure.checklist.chapt: Add one chapter or step per line.
creator.editor.procedure.checklist.media: Add one media reference per line.
creator.editor.procedure.checklist.decis: Add one decision point prompt per line.
creator.editor.procedure.checklist.refer: Add one supporting reference per line.
creator.editor.post.title: Clinical post draft
creator.editor.post.description: Draft the written structure for a publishable educational post with media and access metadata.
creator.editor.post.checklist.body: Write the core teaching body before refining formatting.
creator.editor.post.checklist.photos: Add one photo reference per line.
creator.editor.post.checklist.tags: Separate tags with commas or new lines.
creator.editor.post.checklist.linkedAsse: Link an assessment only when you already know the target identifier.
creator.editor.access.title: Access and publish state
creator.editor.access.description: Set the visibility tier here and choose whether the current save stays a draft or moves into published state.
creator.field.title: Title
creator.validation.summary: Complete the required fields before saving this creator item.
creator.validation.common.visibility: Choose an access state for this creator item.
creator.validation.procedure.title: Add a procedure title.
creator.validation.procedure.chapters: Add at least one chapter or step.
creator.validation.procedure.media: Add at least one media reference.
creator.validation.procedure.decisionPoi: Add at least one decision point.
creator.validation.procedure.references: Add at least one supporting reference.
creator.validation.post.title: Add a post title.
creator.validation.post.body: Add the teaching body for the post.
creator.validation.post.photos: Add at least one photo reference.
pricing.title: Choose learner access and creator economics without changing the core content model.
pricing.description: Operio launches with a free learner tier, a paid learner tier starting at $5/month, and premium creator content sold through the same free, paid, and premium visibility states already present in the product schema.
pricing.action.creator: Open creator workspace
pricing.link.label: View pricing and access
pricing.visibility.free.description: Published content available on the free learner tier.
pricing.visibility.free.feature1: Open access to foundational procedures and clinical posts.
pricing.visibility.free.feature2: Local progress tracking and review entry points stay available without payment.
pricing.visibility.free.feature3: Use the same learner shell before deciding whether deeper access is worth it.
pricing.visibility.paid.description: Included in the paid learner tier starting at $5/month.
pricing.visibility.paid.feature1: Expanded procedure and post access for learners who want broader coverage.
pricing.visibility.paid.feature2: Supports richer review and assessment usage without changing the content authoring model.
pricing.visibility.paid.feature3: Keeps monetized learner access separate from creator-sold premium offers.
pricing.visibility.premium.description: Sold as premium creator content with a 30% Operio platform fee.
pricing.visibility.premium.feature1: Lets creators package specialized procedures or posts beyond the base learner tiers.
pricing.visibility.premium.feature2: Operio keeps 30% of premium sales while the remaining share stays with the creator.
pricing.visibility.premium.feature3: Uses the same visibility metadata already surfaced in creator and learner UI.
pricing.metric.startingPrice.label: Paid learner entry point
pricing.metric.startingPrice.description: The paid learner tier starts at five dollars per month so the free tier can remain broad and the upgrade path stays explicit.
pricing.metric.platformFee.label: Premium creator fee
pricing.metric.platformFee.description: Operio keeps a 30% platform fee on premium creator sales and leaves the remaining share with the creator.
pricing.metric.tierStates.label: Shared access states
pricing.metric.tierStates.description: Free, paid, and premium states now appear in learner discovery, pricing, and creator editing flows.
pricing.status.title: Current build status
pricing.status.description: This build now models pricing and access states in the UI and content schema. Payment collection and entitlement enforcement are intentionally not implemented yet.
landing.hero.description: Operio helps learners study how clinical work is actually done in context, combining expert-led procedures, educational posts, and assessments that reinforce decision making without reducing the product to test prep.
landing.hero.imageAlt: Clinical learning interface with visual anatomy reference
landing.features.description: Operio starts with procedures, posts, and assessments so the platform can support one launch vertical now without hardwiring the product to a single specialty forever.
landing.features.item.procedure.title: Procedure-Based Learning
landing.features.item.procedure.descript: Break down clinical work into chapters, explanations, visual references, and linked decision points so learners can revisit the full flow of a procedure.
landing.features.item.post.title: Clinical Posts And Cases
landing.features.item.post.description: Publish educational posts, case reflections, and practical writeups that extend learning beyond one procedure without losing clinical context.
landing.features.item.assessment.title: Contextual Assessment
landing.features.item.assessment.descrip: Use assessments as reinforcement inside the learning flow, with review routes that help learners revisit weak spots across procedures and posts.
landing.routeMap.title: Information architecture for learners and creators
landing.routeMap.description: Operio organizes the product around learner routes for procedures, posts, review, and anatomy reference, plus creator routes for authoring and publishing.
landing.stats.contentTypes.label: Core Content Types
landing.stats.routes.label: Mapped Product Routes
landing.stats.terms.label: Shared Product Terms
landing.stats.verticals.label: Launch Vertical
landing.stats.verticals.sub: kept narrow without narrowing the platform
landing.technology.description: Operio's architecture is organized around reusable content and role models: learners move through procedures, posts, review, and anatomy reference while creators publish the educational material behind those experiences.
landing.technology.item.playback.title: Procedure Playback Infrastructure
landing.technology.item.playback.descrip: Support chapter-based procedure lessons with media, explanations, and decision points that can evolve without rewriting the platform.
landing.technology.item.progress.title: Adaptive Learning Engine
landing.technology.item.progress.descrip: Track learner progress across procedures, posts, and assessments so the review experience can respond to weak areas over time.
landing.technology.item.validation.title: Clinical Validation
landing.technology.item.validation.descr: Keep launch content grounded in real clinical workflows while preserving room for expansion beyond the first specialty vertical.
landing.technology.item.reference.title: Optional Visual Reference
landing.technology.item.reference.descri: Treat anatomy and 3D reference modules as supporting layers that can attach to procedures or posts when the content needs them.
landing.terminology.title: Name the product around reusable learning concepts
landing.terminology.assumptionsTitle: Separate launch content from platform architecture
landing.terminology.assumptionsDescripti: The current launch content is intentionally narrow. That first dataset can stay specific while the shared product language remains broader than one specialty.
landing.cta.description: The launch dataset can stay focused while the platform stays broader. Explore the learner and creator routes as the first release surface comes together.
product.audience.creator: creator
product.term.procedure.label: procedure
product.term.procedure.definition: A structured, expert-led clinical learning experience with chapters, media, and embedded decision points.
product.term.post.label: post
product.term.post.definition: A text-and-photo educational article, case reflection, or practical write-up that extends learning beyond procedures.
product.term.assessment.label: assessment
product.term.assessment.definition: A question flow that reinforces learning in context instead of defining the product on its own.
product.term.creator.label: creator
product.term.creator.definition: An educator or clinical expert who publishes procedures, posts, and linked assessments.
product.term.learner.label: learner
product.term.learner.definition: A student or clinician using Operio to study procedures, review posts, and track progress.
product.route.learnerHome.label: Learner Home
product.route.learnerHome.title: Learner Home
product.route.learnerHome.summary: The main learner dashboard with entry points into procedures, posts, review, and reference content.
product.route.procedureLibrary.label: Procedures
product.route.procedureLibrary.title: Procedure Library
product.route.procedureLibrary.summary: Browse procedure-based learning content organized for clinical study and repetition.
product.route.procedureDetail.label: Procedure Detail
product.route.procedureDetail.title: Procedure Detail
product.route.procedureDetail.summary: Open a specific procedure with chapters, media, and embedded assessment moments.
product.route.postLibrary.label: Posts
product.route.postLibrary.title: Clinical Posts
product.route.postLibrary.summary: Read clinical posts, case reflections, and educational articles connected to the learning journey.
product.route.postDetail.label: Post Detail
product.route.postDetail.title: Post Detail
product.route.postDetail.summary: Open a specific post with author context, media, and optional linked assessment.
product.route.review.label: Review
product.route.review.title: Review
product.route.review.summary: Return to completed questions and revisit weak areas across procedures and posts.
product.route.anatomy.label: Anatomy
product.route.anatomy.title: Anatomy Reference
product.route.anatomy.summary: View optional anatomy or visual reference content that supports the surrounding lesson.
product.route.creatorWorkspace.label: Creator Workspace
product.route.creatorWorkspace.title: Creator Workspace
product.route.creatorWorkspace.summary: Enter the publishing workspace for building procedures and clinical posts.
product.route.creatorNew.label: New Content
product.route.creatorNew.title: Create New Content
product.route.creatorNew.summary: Start a new procedure or clinical post flow from the creator workspace.
product.route.creatorLibrary.label: Creator Library
product.route.creatorLibrary.title: Creator Library
product.route.creatorLibrary.summary: Manage drafts, published items, and reusable creator assets.
product.route.pricing.label: Pricing
product.route.pricing.title: Pricing
product.route.pricing.summary: Explain learner access tiers and creator economics.
product.assumption.launchDataset.assumpt: Dental procedures, models, and question sets are the initial dataset in this repo.
product.assumption.launchDataset.note: Keep the content source narrow for launch, but do not hardcode dental-only language into shared product concepts.
product.assumption.optionalReference.ass: Anatomy and 3D reference modules may be attached to some learning experiences.
product.assumption.optionalReference.not: Treat visual reference as optional support content rather than the core definition of the product.
product.assumption.assessmentReinforceme: Assessments reinforce content comprehension within procedures and posts.
Do not let exam-style practice become the entire product identity.
product.assumption.creatorRoles.assumpti: Clinical creators publish structured educational content for learners.
product.assumption.creatorRoles.note: Creator and learner roles should remain reusable outside the first domain vertical.
assessment.prompt.title: Assessment prompt
assessment.prompt.continueHint: Answer the current question to continue.
assessment.prompt.result.incorrect: Answer recorded. Review the explanation below.
learnerHome.title: Study procedures first, then reinforce with review and reference.
learnerHome.description: Operio keeps the learner flow centered on structured clinical content while still making room for posts, assessment review, and optional visual anatomy support.
learnerHome.progress.title: Learning progress
learnerHome.progress.description: Stored locally so learner progress persists across procedures and assessments.
learnerHome.progress.label: Procedure completion
learnerHome.entryDescription: Each entry point is explicit so the learner shell can grow into dedicated route experiences without losing a clear navigation model.
learnerHome.entry.procedures.title: Procedures
learnerHome.entry.procedures.description: Open structured procedure walkthroughs with explanations and decision moments.
learnerHome.entry.posts.title: Posts
learnerHome.entry.posts.description: Read clinical posts and practical writeups that extend beyond procedure playback.
learnerHome.entry.review.title: Review
learnerHome.entry.review.description: Return to answered questions and revisit content that still needs repetition.
learnerHome.entry.anatomy.title: Anatomy Reference
learnerHome.entry.anatomy.description: Jump into visual reference content that supports surrounding clinical lessons.
procedureLibrary.title: Browse procedure-based learning with structured playback.
procedureLibrary.description: Each procedure exposes its format, duration, author context, and clinical difficulty before the learner opens the detail flow.
procedureLibrary.error: Unable to load the procedure library right now.
postLibrary.title: Read clinical posts, case reflections, and practical writeups.
postLibrary.description: Posts extend learning beyond procedures with focused articles, technique discussions, and educational case content.
postLibrary.error: Unable to load clinical posts right now.
anatomy.errorLoad: Unable to load the visual reference right now.
anatomy.controls.title: Controls
procedureDetail.error: Unable to load this procedure right now.
procedureDetail.complete.title: Procedure complete
procedureDetail.complete.description: You finished {{title}} and the session has been recorded in local learner progress.
procedureDetail.progress.label: Playback progress
procedureDetail.assessment.title: Decision point
procedureDetail.assessment.continueHint: Answer the decision point to continue.
procedureDetail.reference.title: Reference panel
procedureDetail.reference.description: Supporting anatomy, tools, and technique notes travel with the current section.
procedureDetail.reference.empty: No supporting reference content is attached to this section yet.
postDetail.error: Unable to load this post right now.
postDetail.assessment.heading: Linked assessment ({{current}} of {{total}})
postDetail.assessment.title: Post assessment
postDetail.assessment.continueHint: Answer to reinforce what you just read.
review.error: Unable to load review questions right now.
review.complete.title: Review session complete
review.complete.description: Your standalone assessment run has been added to local learner progress.
review.title: Review
review.description: Revisit answered questions, repeat missed prompts, and run standalone assessments outside the full procedure experience.
review.progress.label: Assessment progress
review.standalone.description: Review mode reuses the same question engine as procedure playback, but without reopening the full procedure flow.
review.standalone.continueHint: Answer this prompt to continue through the standalone review set.
review.sets.title: Standalone review assessments
review.sets.description: Launch a focused review set without reopening a full procedure walkthrough.
review.set.retry.title: Retry missed questions
review.set.retry.description: Repeat the latest prompts you missed and review the teaching explanation again.
review.set.retry.sessionDescription: Focus on the prompts that still need repetition from your latest learner history.
review.set.all.title: Review all answered questions
review.set.all.description: Run a broader standalone assessment across the questions you have already seen.
review.set.all.sessionDescription: Use a broader review set to rehearse answered prompts across procedure-linked assessments.
review.recent.title: Recent prompts
review.recent.description: The latest attempt for each question becomes the signal that drives review mode.
review.recent.empty: Answer procedure-linked questions first. They will appear here as soon as learner progress exists.
review.shared.title: Shared assessment layer
review.shared.description: Procedure-linked prompts and standalone review sets now use the same answer and explanation behavior, keeping the assessment experience consistent across the learner flow.
modelViewer.fallback.label: Visual reference
modelViewer.fallback.noWebgl: 3D rendering is not supported in this environment.
modelViewer.fallback.loadError: The reference model could not be loaded.
creator.workspace.agent.title: AI-assisted drafting
creator.workspace.agent.description: Generate structured drafts for procedures, assessments, and posts. All generated content requires human review before publishing.
creator.workspace.agent.draftDescription: Request an AI-generated procedure, assessment, or post draft from structured input.
creator.workspace.agent.reviewDescriptio: Inspect, approve, reject, or revise generated drafts before they can be saved as publishable content.
agent.draft.title: Generate structured content drafts from a brief.
agent.draft.description: Provide a topic, objective, and notes. The agent generates a structured draft that must pass safety checks and human review before publishing.
agent.draft.procedure_draft.description: Generate a structured procedure with steps, decision points, and reference notes.
agent.draft.assessment_draft.description: Generate assessment questions with explanations and distractor rationale.
agent.draft.post_draft.description: Generate a clinical post draft from topic notes and tags.
agent.field.topic.placeholder: e.g., Simple extraction of a maxillary premolar
agent.field.objective.placeholder: e.g., Identify correct forceps selection and extraction technique
agent.field.notes.placeholder: Optional clinical notes, references, or context to guide the draft
agent.field.assessTopic.placeholder: e.g., Local anesthesia for dental procedures
agent.field.procedureId.placeholder: Optional — link questions to a procedure
agent.field.postNotes.placeholder: Paste your clinical notes or key points here
agent.review.title: Review AI-generated drafts before publishing.
agent.review.description: Every generated draft lands here for inspection. Approve, reject, revise, or regenerate with updated instructions.
agent.review.empty.title: No items to review
agent.review.empty.description: Generate a draft first. All generated content will appear here for review.
agent.chat.title: Learning Assistant
agent.chat.empty: Ask a question about what you're currently studying or creating.
agent.chat.action.suggestQuestions: What should I be able to answer?
agent.chat.action.refinePrompt: Help me write a better brief
